prompt: Using the provided reference image as the base, regenerate the same subject in the same outfit and outdoor café terrace setting, but change the composition to a close, high-angle overhead shot looking down from above. Repose her seated on the wicker café chair, leaning slightly forward and holding a white coffee cup filled with black coffee with both hands near her chest. Keep the lavender sheer blouse, lace camisole detail, gray skirt, jewelry, hair, wicker chair, round stone café table, vase of small white flowers, balcony greenery, and sunny dappled shadows consistent with the reference. Crop tighter around the upper body and table edge, with exactly 1 cup in her hands, 1 empty white saucer on the table, and 1 small glass vase of white flowers visible. Preserve the anonymized face treatment as a solid rectangular blur block over the face. Use realistic natural daylight photography, shallow depth of field, soft highlights, and no added text or watermark.
